creator: basil@vpm.net.ua
text:
- version upgrade
- fix pkg-plist

happy new year

Fix: ===> Generating patch
===> Viewing diff with more
diff -ruN --exclude=CVS /usr/ports/sysutils/ldap-account-manager/Makefile /root/ldap-account-manager/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/sysutils/ldap-account-manager/Makefile	2009-11-26 22:51:56.000000000 +0200
+++ /root/ldap-account-manager/Makefile	2010-01-01 09:17:28.000000000 +0200
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	ldap-account-manager
-PORTVERSION=	2.8.0
+PORTVERSION=	2.9.0
 CATEGORIES=	sysutils www
 MASTER_SITES=	SF/${PNAME}/LAM/${PORTVERSION}
 DISTNAME=	${PORTNAME:L}-${PORTVERSION}
@@ -25,7 +25,7 @@
 DEFAULT_PHP_VER=	5
 
 PNAME=		lam
-PORTDOCS=	docs COPYING HISTORY INSTALL README copyright
+PORTDOCS=	docs COPYING HISTORY README copyright
 LAMDATA=	config graphics help lib locale sess style templates tmp VERSION index.html
 WWWDIR?=	${PREFIX}/www/${PNAME}
 SUB_FILES=	pkg-message
